task_summary: ST17 — Web: public profile page + avatar upload & display. Implemented /users/[username] public profile page with profileProjection() five-field allowlist, UserAvatar component with initials fallback, avatar upload/remove in /profile via ImageUpload(resourceType='avatar'), and avatar display in mention-autocomplete.
final_test_outcomes: 407 tests PASS (0 failures). ST17 new specs: user-avatar.spec.ts (16 tests), users-profile.spec.ts (12 tests) — all 28 execute and pass. Typecheck: 0 errors. Lint: CLEAN — exit 0, 0 warnings. The no-img-element defect from pass-1 is resolved by the implementer's single-line eslint-disable-next-line comment scoped to the element in user-avatar.tsx.
